hardware.note: VF = virtualized fraction of the GPU; number is not a hardware peak

caveats: 7B decode (62.2 tok/s) is nearly identical to 1.5B (64.3 tok/s) => the HuggingFace eager path is framework-bound, NOT compute-bound; the MI300X is far from saturated. A real serving backend (vLLM / llama.cpp-ROCm) would be substantially higher for both sizes.
MI300X VF (virtualized) — not the full physical GPU.
Triage quality improves with model size; the tool's structured JSON system prompt (triage.py) further constrains the verdict vs this raw llm-prompt test.
